typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all headings and DM Sans for body text. Remove existing brutalist fonts.

primary.name: Coral
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, important badges, 'Scan Now' button.

grids: Responsive bento/grid layout. Use gap-6 or gap-8 between major layout containers.
layouts: Sidebar filters on the left (w-72) on desktop, main content on the right. Off-canvas drawer (shadcn Sheet) for mobile filters.
spacing: Generous padding inside cards (p-6). Use p-8 or p-12 for page containers.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft shadows like `shadow-sm` or `shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]` in light mode. Rely on subtle surface color elevation in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.radii: Rounded corners `rounded-2xl` for cards, `rounded-full` or `rounded-xl` for buttons.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use subtle 1px borders (`border-border/50`) instead of brutalist thick borders.

motion.transitions: Use specific transition properties (`transition-colors`, `transition-transform`, `transition-opacity`, `duration-300`, `ease-out`). Do NOT use `transition-all`.
motion.hover_states: Interactive cards should lift slightly on hover (`hover:-translate-y-1`). Buttons should have a subtle brightness or shadow increase.
motion.lists: Implement staggered entrance animations for the apartment cards if possible, otherwise simple opacity fade-ins.

accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA/WCAG standards. Text on primary colored backgrounds must remain fully legible.
All interactive elements and key informational points MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Provide clear focus states for keyboard accessibility (`focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:outline-none`).
media: Apartment images from the scraper should be displayed with `aspect-video` or `aspect-[4/3]`, `object-cover`, and have `rounded-t-2xl` or `rounded-lg` depending on card structure.
3d_libraries: Do NOT use 3D libraries (like Three.js or Spline) for this dashboard. Focus on 2D data clarity and performance.

image_urls.description: No external placeholder images needed. Apartment images will be provided dynamically via the backend API.

components.buttons: Modern minimalist pill-shaped or softly rounded. Use subtle hover translation and active state scaling.
components.header_navbar: Sticky header with glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80`) and a solid 1px bottom border. Never use a fully transparent header.
components.toasts: Use Sonner for toasts (real-time new apartment alerts). Positioned bottom-right. Rounded edges.
components.status_bar: Clean, horizontally scrollable or flex-wrapped. Clear typography for the countdown timer.
components.charts: Recharts styling: Use smooth lines (`type="monotone"`), rounded bars, and hide distracting grid lines (`vertical={false}`). Tooltips should have rounded corners and blur backgrounds.

general_ui_ux_guidelines: Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment.
Avoid generic 'centered everything'. Left-align dense data, forms, labels, and paragraph text.
Never use pure black (`#000000`) or pure gray. Neutral colors must be slightly tinted (the Slate palette handles this).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Refactor all React (.js/.jsx) components from Swiss Brutalism to Modern Minimalism. Do not create .tsx files.
2. Remove brutalist utility classes: remove `rounded-none`, heavy borders (`border-4`, `border-black`), bold monospace typography, and hard shadows (`shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]`).
3. Replace with minimalist classes: `rounded-xl`, `rounded-2xl`, soft shadows (`shadow-sm`, `shadow-md`), and the new fonts (Manrope and DM Sans).
4. Update `tailwind.config.js` with the new HSL variables and font families.
5. Ensure the theme toggle functionality switches the `dark` class on the `html` or `body` element seamlessly.
6. Do not modify the underlying application logic (WebSocket connections, scrapers, PWA install prompt, Admin CRUD, filtering algorithms). The focus is purely on the UI/UX layer.
7. Apply `data-testid` attributes extensively to the redesigned UI elements.
8. Keep the existing German/Ukrainian copy intact.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic by ensuring creative, layered, and distinctive frontend designs.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism effects (12-24px blur).
Do NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition-all`). Target specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container in CSS.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and focus states.
Use generous spacing (2-3x more than usual) to ensure the UI feels premium and uncluttered.
